articles.title_en: Deputy director of Russia’s Defense Ministry ‘Patriot’ park arrested on bribery charges
articles.lead_en: A court has sanctioned the arrest of Vitaly Melimuk, deputy general director of the Defense Ministry’s Patriot park, on charges of accepting an 18-million-ruble bribe, the Russian Investigative Committee’s press service announced. Melimuk serves as the park’s deputy general director for operations and logistics.

Melimuk serves as the park’s deputy general director for operations and logistics.
